HIGHLIGHTS Good Comm skills Good in language fundamental and threading average in EF core SCOPE OF IMPROVEMENT Poor in Angular poor in Azure concepts Poor in indexing design concepts Language/Framework Fundamentals C# ENTITY FRAMEWORK MVC 2 Performance Is Average OVERALL FEEDBACK Good in language fundamental and threading average in EF core Candidate has Basic knowledge QUESTION 1 would there be any (Lock) Performance Issue under below Scenario: where To fix race condition, someone added: private static object _lock = new object(); public void Increment() { lock(_lock) { Counter++; } } Under heavy load, performance dropped significantly. Questions: Why does performance degradefi OUT OF 5

What is lock contentionfi What alternative would you suggestfi Would ConcurrentDictionary help herefi When should you avoid lockfi FEEDBACK Knows about it Candidate has Good knowledge QUESTION 2 What is a task fi How does Parallel.ForEach() differ from Task.WhenAll()fi How to call multiple downstream services in parallelfi Scenario (Order → Inventory service + Payment service) FEEDBACK knows about Task and thread pool and use case of task.WhenAll And Parallel.foreach Candidate has Basic knowledge QUESTION 3 Why there is memory leak when GC existsfi FEEDBACK Knows about gc and dispose Candidate has No knowledge QUESTION 4 Describe how you would handle service versioning in a microservices architecture. Suppose You’re designing a REST API in .NET Web API for a product-based microse rvice

. Suppose You’re designing a REST API in .NET Web API for a product-based microse rvice. v1 should offer only basic API functionality v2 should offer basic + premium functionality v3 should offer all features (basic + premium + exclusive) Using URL-based versioning (/api/v1/products, /api/v2/products, /api/v3/products):

How would you design and implement this versioning strategyfi How would you handle shared logic across versionsfi How would you document it in Swagger/OpenAPIfi What are pros and cons of URL-based versioning compared to other strategiesfi FEEDBACK knows about versioning not aware with the diff between header based vs rout bases use case scenario not aware with how he handles common shared logic Candidate has Basic knowledge QUESTION 5 How to Add a custom header to all responses in .net corefi what would be the order of this custom middleware in the pipelinefi FEEDBACK knows about middleware concepts Candidate has Basic knowledge QUESTION 6 Can we use await inside a Parallel.ForEach loopfi explain in detailfi FEEDBACK Knows about it Candidate has Basic knowledge QUESTION 7 Scenario: You want to track audit fields like CreatedBy,
in detailfi FEEDBACK Knows about it Candidate has Basic knowledge QUESTION 7 Scenario: You want to track audit fields like CreatedBy, CreatedDate automatically f or all entities
. How will you do thatfi FEEDBACK Knows it partially Candidate has No knowledge QUESTION 8 Scenario: You need to update only a few fields via PATCH API

You have a PATCH endpoint to update only 1 or 2 fields of a large entity. What’s the best way to handle this in EF Corefi FEEDBACK not aware with it Candidate has Good knowledge QUESTION 9 Your .NET API allows multiple users to update the same resource. Sometimes one u ser overwrites another's changes. How can you prevent thisfi If User A and User B both load the same customer record: User A changes Name → "John" and saves. User B changes Email → "john@email.com" and saves. Without concurrency control, User B’s save will overwrite User A’s Name change (be cause the whole row is updated). FEEDBACK knows about Optimistic Concurrency in EF Core Candidate has Basic knowledge QUESTION 10 A user’s role changes, but existing JWTs are still valid

. How would you handle this scenariofi What is a refresh token used for fi FEEDBACK Knows about refresh token use case knows about handling of this use case Software Engineering 2 Performance Is Average OVERALL FEEDBACK Good in API concepts Poor middleware error handling poor azure concepts Average DB concepts Poor indexing concepts OUT OF 5

Candidate has Good knowledge QUESTION 1 You are building a Payment API. A client retries the same request due to network fail ure. One middleware throws an error.
